nasb.text: Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the responsibility over the things which were baked in pans.

esv.text: and Mattithiah, one of the Levites, the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, was entrusted with making the flat cakes.

cnv.text: 利未人瑪他提雅是可拉族沙龍的長子，他的職責是管理在煎盤烤餅的事。

ccb.text: 利未人玛他提雅是可拉族沙龙的长子，他负责烤祭饼。
